ddls:
CREATE TABLE "compliance_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance requirement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the compliance requirement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the duration (e.g., days, weeks) */,
  "duration_units" INTEGER /* Duration of the compliance requirement in specified units */,
  "duration_days" INTEGER /* Duration of the compliance in days */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the compliance regulation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Effective start date of the requirement */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Effective end date of the requirement */,
  "renewal_period" TEXT /* Period for renewal of the requirement */,
  "renewal_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of renewal (e.g., annually, bi-annually) */,
  "penalty" TEXT /* Potential penalties for non-compliance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the requirement (e.g., active, pending, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulations" (
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulation */,
  "regulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulation */,
  "jurisdiction" TEXT /* Jurisdiction where the regulation applies */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the regulation */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the regulation */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the regulation */,
  "responsible_authority" TEXT /* Regulatory body responsible for the regulation */,
  "legal_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the legal document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the compliance type (e.g., Environmental, Financial) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the compliance type */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the compliance type */,
  "associated_risks" TEXT /* Potential risks associated with non-compliance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compliance requirement */,
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated regulation */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the mapping */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the mapping */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional information or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_mapping_requirement_id FOREIGN KEY ("requirement_id") REFERENCES compliance_requirements ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_mapping_regulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("regulation_id") REFERENCES regulations ("regulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the compliance management system */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compliance requirement triggering the alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date of the alert notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "reminder_days" INTEGER /* Number of days before the deadline to send reminders */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the alert */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional information or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_alerts_requirement_id FOREIGN KEY ("requirement_id") REFERENCES compliance_requirements ("requirement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., quarterly, annual) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User who approved the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the audit */,
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compliance requirement being audited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the audit */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the audit (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "audit_type" TEXT /* Type of the audit (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "audit_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the audit */,
  "audit_notes" TEXT /* Additional information or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_audits_requirement_id FOREIGN KEY ("requirement_id") REFERENCES compliance_requirements ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compliance requirement the document pertains to */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., policy, procedure) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_documents_requirement_id FOREIGN KEY ("requirement_id") REFERENCES compliance_requirements ("requirement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compliance requirement related to the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., reminder, update) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_notifications_requirement_id FOREIGN KEY ("requirement_id") REFERENCES compliance_requirements ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of the activity (e.g., login, report generation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
